title: isodon japonicus var. japonicus
intro: Isodon japonicus var. japonicus, also known as Japanese Isodon, is a variety of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to East Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and easing digestive issues. Isodon japonicus var. japonicus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be extracted and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
